comments.author: m1--f3
comments.content: PR #82 shows CONFLICTING merge state. Hook is blocking git merge commands in the worktree. Need to identify conflicting files via git merge-tree or rebase.

comments.author: m1--f3
comments.content: Conflict files identified: crosslink/src/main.rs and crosslink/src/commands/mod.rs. Both the review→workflow rename (bc0875f) and TUI init feature (d051ead) modified these files on main, conflicting with the house-style branch's additions.

comments.author: m1--f3
comments.content: Decision: Will manually resolve by reading both sides and editing files to incorporate all changes. The conflicts are mechanical — house-style branch added Style command keeping old Review name, main renamed Review→Workflow and added TUI init flags. Both changes are additive and compatible.
